name: Adalank
subtitle: N-Acetyl Selank Amidate | Enhanced Tuftsin Analog
overview: Enhanced derivative of Selank with improved stability, blood-brain barrier penetration, and extended half-life compared to parent compound. Parent compound Selank approved in Russia since early 2000s.
mechanism: Modulates GABAergic neurotransmission, upregulates hippocampal BDNF, influences serotonin metabolism, and provides immunomodulatory effects without benzodiazepine-like dependency.

items.name: Generalized Anxiety Disorder
items.description: Clinical trials showed effects comparable to benzodiazepines; 40% rapid response within 1-3 days.

items.name: Stress-Related Anxiety
items.description: Reduces stress hormones and balances neurotransmitters without sedation.

items.name: Anxiety without Sedation
items.description: Unlike benzodiazepines, provides relief without tolerance, withdrawal, or dependency.

items.name: Cognitive Enhancement
items.description: Improves focus, attention, and mental clarity.

items.name: BDNF Upregulation
items.description: Rapidly elevates BDNF expression, supporting neuronal survival.

items.name: Stress Resilience
items.description: Enhances ability to cope with psychological stress.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection to belly, thigh, or upper arm. Morning administration aligns with cortisol rhythms.

steps: Inject slowly down vial side (not directly onto powder)
Gently swirl until dissolved (never shake vigorously)

interactions.notes: Adalank is enhanced derivative with improved stability and longer half-life.
Both are Russian nootropic peptides with different mechanisms.
Different mechanisms; Adalank targets neurological pathways, BPC-157 focuses on tissue repair.
Enhances benzodiazepine effects while reducing side effects in research studies.
Consult healthcare provider; affects neurotransmitter systems.

timeline.effects: Gradual anxiety relief, improved mood, enhanced stress resilience
Cognitive enhancement, improved focus, BDNF-mediated neuroplasticity

common: Parent compound has high safety profile in Russian clinical research
stopSigns: Persistent injection site reactions or nasal irritation
contraindications: Experimental peptide with limited direct human research on N-Acetyl form
Not recommended during pregnancy or breastfeeding
Consult healthcare provider before use with psychiatric medications
monitoring: Start with lower doses (100-200mcg) to assess response
Cycle with 1-2 week breaks to prevent tolerance

good: White, fluffy powder; proper freeze-drying indicated
Clear solution after reconstitution; no particles or cloudiness
Proper labeling with peptide name, batch number, manufacturing date
warning: Slight compaction from shipping acceptable if powder dissolves with gentle swirling
bad: Discoloration or yellowing indicates oxidation or degradation
Persistent cloudiness or particles indicate degraded or contaminated peptide

references.title: Selank for GAD - Non-inferiority Trial
references.keyFindings: 62 patients with GAD; 2700mcg/day intranasal; 14 days. Anxiolytic effects comparable to medazepam; 40% rapid response within 1-3 days.

references.title: Selank and BDNF Regulation in Hippocampus
references.keyFindings: Rat study; intranasal administration. Rapidly elevated BDNF expression, confirming neurotrophin involvement.

references.title: Peptide Selank Enhances Diazepam Effects
references.keyFindings: Rats in chronic mild stress model. Enhanced anxiolytic effects while reducing memory impairment and sedation.

quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: room temp or freezer. Reconstituted: 2-8°C for 14-30 days
